text:
Feedback received by originator in private mail:

Jimmie James, 20.10.08, 12:57h CEST:

> Absolutely no change. Start it up, window shows, then crashes. Start 
> with no playlist rm -rf ~/.aqualung it opens fine, while adding music, a 
> mix of .mp3 and .ogg files, it crashes.
